div.style: font-family: Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; text-decoration: none; color: rgb(0, 0, 255); text-align: left; background: transparent; border: none; width: 100%; height: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; padding: 6px 8px; word-break: break-word; white-space: pre-wrap; outline: none; overflow: auto; user-select: none; cursor: default;
